sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id integer, value decimal(10,3));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, CONVERT(123, decimal(10,3)));
UPDATE test_table SET value = CONVERT(value + 100, decimal(10,3)) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, CONVERT(value, varchar(20)) AS value_str FROM test_table;
SELECT id, CONVERT(SUM(value), decimal(10,3)) AS total_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
